app.title: RainySteamRecord

app.firstRun: Clips will be saved to your Desktop. You can change the export path in Settings.

steamVersion.title: Select Steam Version
steamVersion.question: Which version of Steam are you using?

messages.exportPathInvalid: Selected export directory is invalid, using default: {{path}}
messages.gameIdsUpToDate: No update needed - database is already up to date.

Config folder deleted.
